caption: #thepercytree --- I'm going to traveling til mid October - if anyone is nearby and feels like capturing this tree like this in a very critical change period, I'd love that!! Please tag #thepercytree and cc me, and feel free to ask for my very scientific composition steps 😉
#thepercytree from thxgivin 📷 @ellellebean also thx to @juliabueneman and Bridget for supporting that cause!!! I'll be back soon to see the metamorphosis in person myself!!!

#thepercytree - definitely channeling my inner crow right now. Two of em flew to the tree as I approached, cawed, then flew off as I passed. I think they were asking me to look from a different perspective, which isn't such a bad idea
#thepercytree so great to get out into the world, it's a gorgeous day, get out there and use both of your hands if you can! #thingsicandowithonehand ✋🙏💛✨☀️
#thepercytree bye bye ottawa, glad to see you're warming up!! see you in two weeks, if anyone wants to snag pics of this guy in progress I'd be in your debt!!!
#thepercytree and yes there was a few ❄️ on my #morningrun #lazyspring
#thepercytree making a cameo in today's bRUNch! #6run3 #runottawa #ottcityrunclub
Sundays are all about bRUNch. This crew took to the streets and @colinary 's dining table for some festive food. #bRUNch #6RUN3 #run613 #myottawa #instarunners #runottawa #betterforit
Percy tree @mobob it's mine now punk #thepercytree

#thepercytree
.
Home atm, and it’s nice. Ania and I will be off to Paris soon. Some “near France” place after that, not sure where, perhaps a small town in Spain or Portugal (cheap, quiet, nice). If you have any lovely Europe stories/places that you’d care to share as potential visits, that would be 🤘🏼🙌🏼👌🏼
.

#thepercytree 🤕

Thank you to all that passed along well wishes

Also, hi 🇨🇦👋🏼

exif.camera: iPhone 14 Pro back triple camera 6.86mm f/1.78

caption:
#thepercytree 

Life moves pretty fast. If you don’t stop and look around, you could miss it.

I observed and listened to the Percy tree for almost 8 years. I heard you Percy tree. And all you say. I 💚 you Percy tree.

In the early days, you were my running anchor, to get me out of the house. One of the few bastions of discipline I’ve ever had, and I thank you greatly for it. Over the years you kept me coming back, for comfort, nostalgia, consistency, and to remind me that nothing in fact, stays the same.

You were knocked down recently, then knocked down again. The world they say is changing, and changed you along with it. The world has many things to say as well. And some of us are listening.

And now, you are an old stump. And I, but a tired, old man. I don’t need much now. Just a quiet place to sit and rest. And I see you, straightening yourself up, and inviting me to sit, and rest.

I will miss you. I may make art with you as a subject. I may make other things. I may not. It may seem as though I, or perhaps _we_, have lost a bastion of discipline and consistency, a root to help us build upon. Fortunately, they are all around. If you look, listen, and honour.

#thepercystump #rip #ihearyouforest #thegivingtree #saveferris

📸 @aniageerts
